$comment: On-device LLM: Gemma 4 E2B-it via Google's LiteRT-LM. The .litertlm bundle is downloaded into context.filesDir/llm/ on user request and loaded via Engine(EngineConfig). The file is hosted on Hugging Face under litert-community and is publicly downloadable (no auth required). Sha256 is the LFS content hash from the HF API.
